CompletedForm.description: This is a completed form in Skynamo, used for fetching information about completed forms

id.description: The unique ID of the completed form

date.description: The date and time when this form was completed

customer_id.description: The unique ID of the customer where the form was completed

customer_code.description: The unique code of the customer where the form was completed

customer_name.description: The name of the customer where the form was completed

user_id.description: The unique ID of the user that completed the form

user_name.description: The user name of the user that completed the form

interaction_id.description: The unique ID of the interaction in which this form was completed

form_id.description: The unique ID of the form definition that was completed

form_name.description: The name of the form definition that was completed

last_modified_time.description: The last time the completed form was modified

IntegrationFormValues.description: This is the integration form values in Skynamo

id.description: The unique ID of the active integration

name.description: The name of the active integration

last_modified_time.description: The last time the integration values was modified

Contact.description: This is a contact in Skynamo, used for fetching information about contacts

id.description: A unique ID assigned to this contact

customer_id.description: A unique ID assigned to the customer this contact belongs to

customer_code.description: The customer code of the customer this contact belongs to

customer_name.description: The name of the customer this contact belongs to

title.description: The abbreviated title of the contact, e.g. Mr, Mrs, Prof, Dr

company.description: The company name of the customer this contact belongs to

website.description: The URL of the contact’s website

job_title.description: The contact’s job title or role at the company

notes.description: Additional notes that have been added to this contact

row_version.description: An automatically generated, unique number used to version-stamp table rows in the database

last_modified_time.description: The last date that this contact was modified

create_date.description: The date on which this contact was created

active.description: A boolean that indicates whether this contact is active (TRUE) or inactive (FALSE)

address.description: The contact's address. Newline-separated values are supported.

Configuration.description: This is a configuration in Skynamo, used for fetching information about set configurations values

company_logo.description: The guid of the company image

hide_links_in_emails.description: Indicates whether links are hidden in emails

export_customers_on_imports.description: Indicates whether a customer export will execute once integration is triggered

export_products_on_imports.description: Indicates whether a product export will execute once integration is triggered

export_credit_requests_on_imports.description: Indicates whether a credit request export will execute once integration is triggered

export_orders_on_imports.description: Indicates whether a order export will execute once integration is triggered

export_quotes_on_imports.description: Indicates whether a quote export will execute once integration is triggered

warning_price_list_id.description: The id of the warning price list

cost_price_list_id.description: The id of the cost price list

deals.description: A list of deal details to add or update in the deal group. PUT matches an existing deal by id first; otherwise the server uses the supplied deal identifiers to locate the existing deal before replacing the remaining fields. Existing deals not included in the request remain unchanged.

Filters.name: filters
Filters.description:
Used to filter information.

Filters available :
- less_than
- less_than_equals
- greater_than
- greater_than_equals
- equals
- starts_with

Available filter parameters:
- id
- code
- create_date

Examples:
- ["less_than(id,5)"]
- ["starts_with(code,HB_)"]
- ["greater_than_equals(create_date, 2026-01-01)"]

FiltersLogEntry.name: filters
FiltersLogEntry.description:
Used to filter information.

Filters available :
- greater_than_equals

Available filter parameters:
- time

Examples:
- ["greater_than_equals(time, 2026-01-01T00:00:00+02:00)"]

Notes:
This call retrieves 200 entries.
Utilize the timestamp of the last entry as a filter for the subsequent 200 entries.
Make sure to encode characters such as the plus sign (+).
